title: phyllanthus myrtifolius
intro: Phyllanthus myrtifolius, also known as the West Indian gooseberry or Maypuri, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus myrtifolius include its ability to protect the liver, improve digestion, and reduce fever, making it a sought-after herb in herbal medicine. Phyllanthus myrtifolius is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and fruits are used in various herbal preparations to treat a range of health conditions.
